# Perturb-seq protocol (in-house version)

Adapted from Dixit 2016 and Replogle 2022. Ten-day experimental protocol.

## Day 1
- Plate HEK293T cells at 30% confluence in 6-well plates.

## Day 2
- Transfect with lentiviral sgRNA library + Cas9.

## Day 4
- Select with puromycin.

## Day 9
- Harvest, FACS-sort single live cells into 10x Chromium chip.

## Day 10
- Library prep, submit to core for sequencing.
